query.name: list
query.sql: SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.name, c.type, c.sort_order, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM ml_category c WHERE c.user_id = ${@user_id} #AND_CLAUSE# ORDER BY c.type ASC, c.sort_order ASC, c.id ASC

collisionSql.where: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_category WHERE user_id = ${@user_id} AND type = ${@type} AND name = TRIM(${@name}))
collisionSql.message: 同类型下已有该分类名称

sqls.executeSql: INSERT INTO ml_category (user_id, name, type, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (${@user_id}, TRIM(${@name}), ${@type}, COALESCE(${@sort_order}, 100), NOW(), NOW())

collisionSql.where: NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_category WHERE id = ${@id} AND user_id = ${@user_id})
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_category c2 WHERE c2.user_id = ${@user_id} AND c2.type = (SELECT type FROM ml_category WHERE id = ${@id}) AND c2.name = TRIM(${@name}) AND c2.id <> ${@id})
collisionSql.message: 同类型下已有该分类名称

collisionSql.where: NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_category WHERE id = ${@id} AND user_id = ${@user_id})

collisionSql.message: 该分类下已有流水，无法删除

sqls.executeSql: DELETE FROM ml_category WHERE id = ${@id} AND user_id = ${@user_id}
